report_name: New 'NBLOCK' Ransomware Emerges, Using AES-256 Encryption and Tor for Anonymous Extortion

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: NBLOCK ransomware encrypts victim files using AES-256 and appends the .NBLock extension to render them inaccessible.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Phishing emails with malicious attachments are a likely distribution vector for the NBLOCK ransomware.

attack_patterns.name: Web Protocols
attack_patterns.description: NBLOCK operators use a Tor-based web portal for anonymous command and control, specifically for ransom negotiation with victims.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: NBLOCK ransomware likely deletes volume shadow copies using 'vssadmin.exe delete shadows /all /quiet' to prevent system recovery from backups.

malware.name: NBLOCK
malware.description: A new ransomware family that encrypts files with AES-256, appends the '.NBLock' extension, drops a ransom note named 'README_NBLOCK.txt', and uses a Tor portal for communication.

tools.name: Tor
tools.description: Used by the NBLOCK operators to host an anonymous negotiation portal for communicating with victims.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: Used to delete volume shadow copies to prevent victims from recovering encrypted files from local backups.

infrastructure.name: NBLOCK Tor Negotiation Portal
infrastructure.description: An anonymous Tor-based portal used for communication and ransom negotiation between the NBLOCK operators and their victims.

indicators.name: NBLOCK Ransomware File Artifacts
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: NBLOCK Ransomware File Artifacts
id: 2b1a9c8d-f3e4-4b1a-8c7d-9e0f1a2b3c4d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of NBLOCK ransomware artifacts, such as the ransom note or key file.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-17-april-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-17
tags:
  - attack.t1486
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\README_NBLOCK.txt'
      - '\key.bin'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files associated with NBLOCK ransomware, such as the ransom note 'README_NBLOCK.txt' and the key file 'key.bin'.

indicators.name: NBLOCK Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: NBLOCK Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 8d7c6b5a-4f3e-4d2c-b1a0-9e8f7d6c5b4a
status: experimental
description: Detects the command used by NBLOCK ransomware to delete volume shadow copies, inhibiting system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-17-april-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-17
tags:
  - attack.t1490
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
      - '/all'
      - '/quiet'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete all volume shadow copies quietly, a common technique used by ransomware like NBLOCK to prevent recovery.
